name: hirelens-extension
description: HireLens Interview Copilot — AI-powered interview assistant for Google Meet

scripts.build: npx tsc --noEmit && vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && node -e "console.log('\n>>> HireLens: Load unpacked from hirelens-extension/dist. After Reload on chrome://extensions, REFRESH any open Meet tab (F5) so the new script loads.\n')"
